reviews.review_body: A very bad experience with this school principal.  She don't know the English language,what she told the children?.. Better you people trained very well .. very Rudy school...   The principal told to parents we beat your children very well. This is the year 2023...Are you people mad .. If your education beating education then policemen were teach you the educate you .......

reviews.author: Om Sai ram
reviews.review_body: My life is spoiled because of this school 😭.Think 100 times before you join . If you want to spoil your child life join in this school , worst in maths ,Few are unqualified teachers, if you want to join your child because this school is near by , don't think like that go for other nearby schools . I don't want to give atleast one star but it is mandatory to give .
